readme_note: The youtube videos here are marked in order of appearance in overdeliverbook.com

videos.speaker: Jay Abraham

videos.topic: Abraham 101 keynote for investors; out-thinking and out-marketing competition; cross-industry strategy transfer; business as investment vehicle
